subject: feat(theme): change default theme combo from Teal to Nordic
body:
Nordic (nord light / abyss dark) is now the default combo. Updated
DEFAULT_COMBO constant and the mandatory light/dark CSS variants
in global.css to use nord/abyss values.

The +html.tsx body background automatically picks up the change via
resolveThemeName(DEFAULT_COMBO, true) — no manual update needed.

Tags: theme, daisyui, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: daisyui-theme-migration
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01EAwig8kSZ6S91pb3wP7tv4
title: change default theme combo from Teal to Nordic
